docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,595.36 FILED BY HERNANDEZ, LYDIA AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, JUAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-29-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HERNANDEZ, LYDIA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
ORDER RE: CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 10/11/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 7/29/19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY PLAINTIFF LYDIA HERNANDEZ. DEFENDANT JUAN HERNANDEZ IS PRESENT. JUDGE: A JAMES ROBERTSON II, CLERK: W. TRUPEK, NOT REPORTED (506)
